frames.description: View of 'Hotel Preetham' and 'Preetham Bar & Restaurant' buildings. The hotel building has a modern grey facade with circular cutouts. Several motorcycles are parked in front.
signs: PREETHAM BAR & RESTAURANT / ಪ್ರೀತಮ್ ಬಾರ್ ಮತ್ತು ರೆಸ್ಟೋರೆಂಟ್
frames.pedestrians: Two men standing near the hotel entrance.
frames.infrastructure: Multi-story commercial buildings, overhead power lines.

frames.description: The camera pans right showing 'AG Fashion Point' and 'Popular Medicals'. A tall telecommunications tower is visible in the background.
signs: AG FASHION POINT - Exclusive for Men / ಎಜಿ ಫ್ಯಾಶನ್ ಪಾಯಿಂಟ್
frames.pedestrians: People standing in front of shops.
frames.infrastructure: Two-story commercial building, telecom tower, power lines.

frames.description: Close-up of 'Bag Palace' and 'Perfect Time' watch sales. Part of 'Ashraya A/C Bar' sign is visible to the right.
signs: PERFECT TIME WATCH SALES & SERVICE / ಪರ್ಫೆಕ್ಟ್ ಟೈಮ್ ವಾಚ್ ಸೇಲ್ಸ್ ಅಂಡ್ ಸರ್ವಿಸ್
ASHRAYA A/C BAR / ಆಶ್ರಯ ಎಸಿ ಬಾರ್
frames.pedestrians: None clearly visible.

frames.description: Front view of 'Ashraya A/C Bar & Restaurant'. Below it are shops like 'Padmashri Opticals' and 'Dhanvantari Ayurvedic Stores'.
signs: ASHRAYA A/C BAR & RESTAURANT / ಆಶ್ರಯ ಎಸಿ ಬಾರ್ ಮತ್ತು ರೆಸ್ಟೋರೆಂಟ್
DHANVANTARI AYURVEDIC STORES / ಧನ್ವಂತರಿ ಆಯುರ್ವೇದ ಸ್ಟೋರ್ಸ್
frames.pedestrians: A few people near the shop entrances.

frames.description: A wider view showing the gap between 'Ashraya' and the 'Darshan Orchid' building. 'Genius Academy' and 'Srinivas Wellness Club' are in Darshan Orchid.
signs: SRINIVAS WELLNESS CLUB / ಶ್ರೀನಿವಾಸ್ ವೆಲ್ನೆಸ್ ಕ್ಲಬ್
BANKUR MULTISPECIALITY DENTAL CLINIC / ಬಂಕೂರ ಮಲ್ಟಿಸ್ಪೆಷಾಲಿಟಿ ಡೆಂಟಲ್ ಕ್ಲಿನಿಕ್
frames.pedestrians: Several people walking on the sidewalk.

frames.description: Centered on the 'Darshan Orchid' building showing various businesses like 'Sri Siddharoodha Book Stall' and 'Sai Drishti Opticals'.
signs: SRI SIDDHAROODHA BOOK STALL / ಶ್ರೀ ಸಿದ್ಧಾರೂಢ ಬುಕ್ ಸ್ಟಾಲ್
SAI DRISHTI OPTICALS / ಸಾಯಿ ದೃಷ್ಟಿ ಆಪ್ಟಿಕಲ್ಸ್
DAKHNI TEA & EGG CENTRE / ದಖ್ನಿ ಟೀ ಅಂಡ್ ಎಗ್ ಸೆಂಟರ್
frames.pedestrians: A person entering the book stall.

frames.description: The camera moves forward; a blue road direction sign is now prominent on the right side.
signs: BAHAMANI SEVEN TOMBS / ಬಹಮನಿ ಸಪ್ತ ಗುಮ್ಮಟ
NEW JEWARGI ROAD / ನ್ಯೂ ಜೇವರ್ಗಿ ರಸ್ತೆ
frames.vehicles: A few vehicles are partially visible in traffic.
frames.pedestrians: Pedestrians on the side of the road.

frames.description: Approaching the corner of the Darshan Orchid building. The pink 'Ashraya Deluxe Lodge' building appears on the right.
signs: ASHRAYA DELUXE LODGE / ಆಶ್ರಯ ಡಿಲಕ್ಸ್ ಲಾಡ್ಜ್
frames.vehicles: Cars and rickshaws in the background.
frames.pedestrians: People walking along the sidewalk.

frames.description: Closer view of the pink 'Ashraya Deluxe Lodge' building with 'Colourideas' shop at the base.
signs: ASHRAYA DELUXE LODGE / ಆಶ್ರಯ ಡಿಲಕ್ಸ್ ಲಾಡ್ಜ್
frames.pedestrians: People near the shop entrance.

frames.description: A large yellow VRL Logistics truck passes by, partially obscuring the view of 'Ashraya Deluxe Lodge'.
signs: VRL LOGISTICS LTD / ವಿಆರ್‌ಎಲ್ ಲಾಜಿಸ್ಟಿಕ್ಸ್ ಲಿಮಿಟೆಡ್
frames.pedestrians: None clearly visible.

frames.description: The truck has moved, revealing the full facade of 'Ashraya Deluxe Lodge' and the adjacent 'Rawoor Orchid' building.
signs: ASHRAYA DELUXE LODGE / ಆಶ್ರಯ ಡಿಲಕ್ಸ್ ಲಾಡ್ಜ್
ZAIN BAKERY & GENERAL STORES / ಝೈನ್ ಬೇಕರಿ ಮತ್ತು ಜನರಲ್ ಸ್ಟೋರ್ಸ್
frames.pedestrians: A man walking near the lodge entrance.

frames.description: Frontal view of 'Rawoor Orchid' which houses an Axis Bank branch.
signs: dil se open / ದಿಲ್ ಸೆ ಓಪನ್
frames.pedestrians: People on the bank stairs.

frames.description: Transitioning from Rawoor Orchid to an older building with 'Jivanjor' paints advertisement.
frames.pedestrians: A man standing in a shop doorway.
frames.infrastructure: Old two-story shop building, electrical transformer structure.

frames.description: View of '2R Electricals' and a tall modern glass building named 'Kranti'.
signs: All Recharge Available Here / ಎಲ್ಲಾ ರೀಚಾರ್ಜ್ ಲಭ್ಯವಿದೆ
frames.pedestrians: A few people near the electrical shop.

frames.description: Full view of the 'Kranti' building with its distinctive blue-tinted windows. 'ego's' logo is visible on top.
signs: KALYAN KARNATAKA ELECTRICAL ENTERPRISES / ಕಲ್ಯಾಣ ಕರ್ನಾಟಕ ಎಲೆಕ್ಟ್ರಿಕಲ್ ಎಂಟರ್‌ಪ್ರೈಸಸ್
frames.pedestrians: People under umbrellas on the right.

frames.description: Continuing past the Kranti building. A large billboard for Malabar Gold & Diamonds starts to appear on the right.
signs: MALABAR GOLD & DIAMONDS / ಮಲಬಾರ್ ಗೋಲ್ಡ್ ಮತ್ತು ಡೈಮಂಡ್ಸ್
frames.pedestrians: A person walking on the sidewalk.

frames.description: Detailed view of the 'Malabar Gold' billboard featuring Alia Bhatt. Below it are 'New Style' and 'Anchor Panasonic' shops.
signs: GM SWITCH TO A BETTER WORLD / ಜಿಎಂ ಸ್ವಿಚ್ ಟು ಎ ಬೆಟರ್ ವರ್ಲ್ಡ್
frames.pedestrians: A man sitting on a ledge near 'New Style'.
frames.infrastructure: Commercial building, billboard, traffic light pole.

frames.description: The camera pans further right showing a 'Hot Chips' store and another billboard for 'The Reflecta Collection'.
signs: SHREE KRISHNA HOT CHIPS / ಶ್ರೀ ಕೃಷ್ಣ ಹಾಟ್ ಚಿಪ್ಸ್
THE REFLECTA COLLECTION / ದಿ ರಿಫ್ಲೆಕ್ಟಾ ಕಲೆಕ್ಷನ್
frames.pedestrians: People near the hot chips shop.

frames.description: Close-up of shops under billboards, including an eye clinic sign.
frames.pedestrians: Pedestrians on the sidewalk.

frames.description: Approaching a large overhead structure spanning the road. Various shop signs are visible.
frames.pedestrians: None.

frames.description: Moving directly under the large overhead billboard. A white billboard is visible ahead.
frames.pedestrians: None.

frames.description: Passing under the overhead structure. More billboards and a blue flag are visible.
frames.pedestrians: None.

frames.description: Continuing under the structure. The white billboard is now more clearly visible.
frames.pedestrians: None.

frames.description: Exiting from under the large structure. A tall transmission tower is seen in the distance.
frames.pedestrians: People standing on the side of the road.

frames.description: A view of the street ahead with trees and more commercial buildings.
frames.pedestrians: People gathered on the sidewalk.

frames.description: Approaching an intersection with a 'No Parking' sign visible on a tree.
signs: NO PARKING / ನೋ ಪಾರ್ಕಿಂಗ್ (indicated by sign)
frames.pedestrians: Crowd of people by the roadside.

frames.description: View of a building with an orange and white facade, housing medical clinics.
signs: SUCHARITA HEART CLINIC / ಸುಚರಿತ ಹಾರ್ಟ್ ಕ್ಲಿನಿಕ್
frames.pedestrians: People near the building entrance.
frames.infrastructure: Clinic building, utility pole with flags.

frames.description: Showing adjacent buildings with 'Ayush Diagnostics' and 'Balaji' stores.
signs: SAI DENTAL CLINIC & IMPLANT CENTRE / ಸಾಯಿ ಡೆಂಟಲ್ ಕ್ಲಿನಿಕ್
frames.pedestrians: None clearly visible.

frames.description: A view of more shops like 'Ayush Diagnostics' and advertisements for 'Airtel 5G Plus' and 'Coca-Cola'.
frames.pedestrians: None.

frames.description: Approaching a petrol pump station with a large 'Extra Premium' billboard.
frames.pedestrians: People near the petrol station.
frames.infrastructure: Petrol pump canopy, large advertising billboards.
